items.title: More from Brian Wright on Dylan Harper and De'Aaron Fox:
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
More from Brian Wright on Dylan Harper and De'Aaron Fox:

"They're are a tough matchup. We'll continue to put them in situations for them to be at their best...They'll learn from this year on how they continue to play off one another and support one another and go from there."

items.title: A (champagne) blast from the past, featuring me, Kobe and ... Dylan Harper's dad.
items.author: Howard Beck
items.body_excerpt:
A (champagne) blast from the past, featuring me, Kobe and ... Dylan Harper's dad.

What I remember: Kobe was literally in mid-quote when the spraying started. I had to retreat to keep my tape recorder and notepad from getting soaked.

(Don't ask me to explain the facial hair, glasses or pants.)
